panels.title: CO₂ medio ahora (todas aulas)
panels.description: WHO: <800 confort, <1000 aceptable, <1400 degradado, >1400 acción. ASHRAE 62.1: 1000 ppm indoor max.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "telemetry")
  |> range(start: -2m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "captia_point" and r.variable == "co2")
  |> last()
  |> group()
  |> mean()

panels.title: Tiempo en confort (% aulas en zona ASHRAE)
panels.description: % de aulas con CO₂<1000 AND 20°C≤T≤26°C AND 30%≤RH≤60%. Zona confort ASHRAE 55.

targets.query:
co2 = from(bucket: "telemetry")
  |> range(start: -2m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "captia_point" and r.variable == "co2")
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with comfortable: if r._value < 1000.0 then 1.0 else 0.0 }))
  |> group()
  |> mean(column: "comfortable")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r.comfortable * 100.0 }))

co2

panels.title: Aulas en alerta CO₂ (>1400 ppm)
panels.description: Aulas con CO₂ crítico ahora — acción inmediata: ventilar.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "telemetry")
  |> range(start: -2m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "captia_point" and r.variable == "co2")
  |> last()
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value > 1400.0)
  |> group()
  |> count()

panels.title: Ocupación total (personas, ahora)
panels.description: Suma people-count de todas aulas activas.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "telemetry")
  |> range(start: -2m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "captia_point" and r.variable == "people-count")
  |> last()
  |> group()
  |> sum()

panels.title: CO₂ por aula (con thresholds WHO/ASHRAE)
panels.description: CO₂ time series por aula. Líneas threshold a 800/1000/1400.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "telemetry")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "captia_point" and r.variable == "co2")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "asset_id"])

panels.title: CO₂ por aula × hora (heatmap, 24h)
panels.description: Hot spots: aulas con CO₂ alto persistente. Patrones diarios visibles.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "telemetry")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "captia_point" and r.variable == "co2")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "asset_id"])

panels.title: Ranking aulas por CO₂ medio (24h)
panels.description: Top aulas con peor IAQ. Color RdYlGn invertido (rojo = peor).

targets.query:
from(bucket: "telemetry")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "captia_point" and r.variable == "co2")
  |> group(columns: ["asset_id"])
  |> mean()
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 10)

panels.title: Drill-down: ${asset} — CO₂ + T + RH + ocupación
panels.description: Vista detalle de aula seleccionada. Útil para investigar correlaciones.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "telemetry")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "captia_point" and r.variable == "co2" and r.asset_id == "${asset}")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _field: "CO2 (ppm)" }))

from(bucket: "telemetry")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "captia_point" and r.variable == "temperature_01" and r.asset_id == "${asset}")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _field: "T (°C)" }))

from(bucket: "telemetry")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "captia_point" and r.variable == "relative-humidity" and r.asset_id == "${asset}")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _field: "RH (%)" }))

from(bucket: "telemetry")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "captia_point" and r.variable == "people-count" and r.asset_id == "${asset}")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _field: "People" }))

from(bucket: "telemetry")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "captia_point" and r.variable == "avg-sound-level" and r.asset_id == "${asset}")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _field: "Sound (dB)" }))
